text: Entering this space, I am greeted by brightly-lit, modern aesthetics—glass, metal, and smooth surfaces, all coexisting with the warmth of colored walls and illuminated displays. I sense a feeling of anticipation, the kind that arises when knowledge is housed just behind a transparent partition. The R+D wall hints at innovation and possibility. I feel quietly stimulated by the blend of curiosity, the potential for learning, and the subtle hum of human ingenuity around me. There is a gentle invitation to explore, observe, and reflect.
